message:
fix: resolve 4 correctness issues in TUI, export, cache, and graph

- tui: replace direct array indexing with bounds-safe selected_issue()
  in history_copy_to_clipboard and history_open_in_browser to prevent
  panic after background reload changes issue list size

- export_pages: add escape_html() for title parameter in render_index_html
  to prevent stored XSS when exported pages are deployed to static hosting

- cache: add 3 missing AnalysisConfig toggles (enable_critical_path,
  enable_articulation, enable_slack) to cache key hash, preventing stale
  cache hits when these toggles differ between queries

- advanced: cap compute_k_paths DFS enumeration at min(10*k, 10_000) paths
  to prevent unbounded memory/CPU consumption on high-fan-out graphs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
